stories.headline: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Are All Smiles at NFL Event After Weekend Apart - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were all smiles Monday night at an NFL event after the lovebirds spent the weekend apart engaged in what appeared to be pre-wedding activities.

stories.summary: Sexyy Red and her family were the victims of a burglary in Florida, where half a million dollars in handbags and necklaces were stolen ... at least according to a lawsuit she filed against a security…

stories.headline: 'RHONY' Newbie Daisy Dragged By Costar Over Longtime Boss Martha Stewart - TMZ
stories.summary: Martha Stewart’s longtime makeup artist, Daisy Toye, ruffled feathers during production on her first season of "The Real Housewives of New York" ... after she allegedly told pals she wanted to trade…

stories.headline: Connecticut dad jumped to his death during concert at Madison Square Garden in NYC: report - Fox News
stories.summary: A Connecticut man allegedly appeared intoxicated before jumping from a balcony at a Goose concert at Madison Square Garden, according to witnesses.

stories.headline: Clive Davis, music titan behind Whitney Houston, dies at 94 - USA Today
stories.summary: Clive Davis, the record mogul and music industry titan who discovered talents including Whitney Houston and Barry Manilow, has died.

stories.headline: Jay-Z's Roc Nation Scores Major Win in Tony Buzbee Legal War - TMZ
stories.summary: The bitter legal war between Jay-Z and attorney Tony Buzbee just took another turn and this round went to Roc Nation.

stories.headline: ‘Toy Story 5’ Streaming: Disney Unlikely To Change PVOD Strategy Despite Big Opening - Forbes
stories.summary: "Toy Story 5" scored the biggest opening weekend of 2026 with $159.6 million in domestic ticket sales June 19-21, but will that affect Disney’s streaming plans for Pixar release?

stories.headline: Emma Watson Debuts Her Longest Hair Since Her 'Harry Potter' Era While Meeting With Prince William - instyle.com
stories.summary: Emma Watson had fans doing a double take with her longest hair since her 'Harry Potter' era during an appearance with Prince William on June 22. See her Hermione Granger-coded look, here.
